message:
perf(sse): intern OpenAI Responses API event types

Add 16 OpenAI Responses API event type strings to intern_event_type()
to eliminate per-event String allocations during streaming. These event
types (response.completed, response.output_text.delta, etc.) are used
on the hot path of OpenAI Responses streaming and benefit from the same
Cow::Borrowed optimization already applied to Anthropic event types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
